tagline: Heritage Wealth Management & Foreign Exchange Solutions

sections.name: Hero
sections.copy: WM Logic Family Office Limited - Your Trusted Partner in Wealth Management and Foreign Exchange. Operating from the heart of Makurdi, we provide professional bureau de change services and comprehensive family office solutions. Building financial legacies across Benue State and beyond.
sections.imagePrompt: Professional Nigerian financial office interior with modern glass desk, executive leather chairs, financial charts on wall-mounted screens, warm ambient lighting, view of Makurdi cityscape through floor-to-ceiling windows, sophisticated and trustworthy atmosphere, photorealistic, high-end corporate photography

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy:
WM Logic Family Office Limited, also operating as WM Logic Heritage Wealth Co, is a premier financial services institution based in Makurdi, Benue State. As a licensed bureau de change operator, we specialize in foreign exchange transactions while providing comprehensive family office services to high-net-worth individuals and families across Nigeria.

Our commitment is to preserve and grow generational wealth through strategic financial planning, transparent currency exchange services, and personalized wealth management solutions. With our deep understanding of the Nigerian financial landscape and global currency markets, we serve as your dedicated partner in achieving financial security and prosperity.

Located at C34/35 Hudco Quarters North Bank, Makurdi, we combine international financial standards with local market expertise to deliver exceptional service to our valued clients.
sections.imagePrompt: Modern Nigerian financial services office in Makurdi, professional African business team reviewing documents around conference table, Lagos and Abuja skyline artwork on walls, Nigerian currency notes and international currencies displayed professionally, natural lighting, corporate professionalism, photorealistic business photography

sections.name: Our Services
sections.copy:
**Bureau de Change Services**
We provide competitive rates for buying and selling major foreign currencies including USD, GBP, EUR, and other international currencies. Our transactions are fast, secure, and fully compliant with Central Bank of Nigeria regulations.

**Family Office Management**
Comprehensive wealth management services tailored for affluent families, including investment advisory, estate planning, and multi-generational wealth preservation strategies.

**Foreign Exchange Advisory**
Expert guidance on currency market trends, hedging strategies, and optimal timing for international transactions to maximize value for our clients.

**Corporate FX Solutions**
Specialized foreign exchange services for businesses engaged in international trade, including bulk transactions and corporate rate negotiations.

**Wealth Preservation Planning**
Strategic planning to protect and grow your assets across market cycles, ensuring your family's financial security for generations to come.

**Investment Consultation**
Personalized investment advice aligned with your financial goals, risk tolerance, and long-term wealth objectives.
sections.imagePrompt: Split screen composition: left side shows hands exchanging international currency notes (USD, EUR, GBP) on polished wooden desk with Nigerian naira in background; right side shows diverse Nigerian professionals analyzing financial charts on tablet and laptop, modern Makurdi office setting, professional lighting, photorealistic financial services imagery

sections.name: Contact Us
sections.copy:
**Visit Our Office**

**Why Choose WM Logic Family Office?**
✓ Licensed and regulated bureau de change operator

✓ Personalized wealth management approach

Schedule your confidential consultation today and discover how we can help secure your financial future.
